title: K-200 Battery Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Battery Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-434-D. Revision: D. Type: test-report. Author: Rowan Ellery. Created: 2023-07-20. Last modified: 2023-09-14. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1161, P-1079, P-1180, P-1060.
